title: calochortus invenustus var. montanus
intro: Calochortus invenustus var. montanus, also known as the Sierra mariposa lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hyacinthaceae. This perennial plant is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and has been used by indigenous peoples for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's bulbs and roots are used to treat various health issues, such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal benefits.
